emails.subject: Updated Enron Discrepancy list
emails.body: This seems too small to bother with. What do you think? Regards, Ben Forwarded by Ben Jacoby/HOU/ECT on 09/22/2000 02:40 PM Matthew Tezyk@ENRON_DEVELOPMENT 09/22/2000 03:30 PM

emails.subject: Re: Updated Enron Discrepancy list
emails.body: Re: Updated Enron Discrepancy list Pretty small stuff from a dollar standpoint. Perhaps the sky is not falling. Ben F Jacoby@ECT 09/22/2000 04:29 PM Sent by: Ben Jacoby@ECT
